title: Juicy Tools
description: A vanilla friendly modern look for the tools!
body:
**Juicy Tools** is a lightweight resource pack focused on redesigning Minecraft tools. The sprites come from my main project, [Brush & Juice](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brush-and-juice), but based on community feedback, this pack exists **for players who want only the tool retextures** without the rest of the changes.

### Features

<details>
<summary>Show features</summary>

- All Vanilla Tool sets.
- Farmer's Delight Compat.

</details>

### Terms of Use

<details>
<summary>Show terms</summary>

#### You’re allowed to do:
- Include this resource pack in public or private modpacks  
  *(credit and a link to the official project page are highly appreciated but not required)*
- Create add-ons or compatibility packs, as long as they do not include or redistribute any of this project’s original assets or individual components, unless you have explicit permission
- Use it on your server (including as a server resource pack)
- Use it in videos, streams, and other content (including monetized content)

#### What’s not allowed:
- Reupload or redistribute this resource pack, its files, or any of its assets or individual components on third-party websites or platforms
- Port or convert this resource pack (or its assets) to Minecraft Bedrock Edition or to any other game or platform
- Sell, sublicense, or claim ownership over this resource pack or any of its assets or components

If something isn’t listed above, it’s probably not allowed — feel free to ask me if you’re unsure. Thank you, and I hope you enjoy it <3

</details>
